panels.description: medium close-up of a young South Asian man with dark curly hair and round black-rimmed glasses, seated cross-legged on a vibrant ornate magic carpet, twilight sky background; he looks down intensely at a scattering of shiny coins cupped in his hands

the man suddenly lifts his head, shifting gaze from coins to directly forward into the camera, expression surprised and wide-eyed, glasses reflecting faint light, still seated on magic carpet in twilight

camera pulls back and tilts upward revealing the floating ornate magic carpet fully against a vast twilight sky with distant city lights below, man still seated cross-legged looking forward, emphasizing surreal flight

caption_summary: Young man counts coins on a flying magic carpet, then looks up surprised as the camera reveals their surreal journey over a city at twilight.
